Barista 0.0.1
  • Reference
    • Organizing study repos using Barista

Barista: Barista

Source: R/Barista.R
Barista-package.Rd

Barista, aka "Brewing A Resource Integration Standard Transforming Analyses," is a new R package in development for organizing a Ulysses and CohortGenerator backed pipeline for study repos.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://ohdsi.github.io/Barista/

  • https://github.com/OHDSI/Barista

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/OHDSI/Barista/issues

Author

  • Katy Sadowski katy.sadowski@boehringer-ingelheim.com

Other contributors:

  • Carmen Ng carmen.ng@boehringer-ingelheim.com [contributor]
